name: Port and Harbor Operations
rationale: Highest ODI in set (6.57 — 18/25 needs underserved, AFIR 2030 mandate creates schedule pressure) + emerging incumbent profile (5.5). Constraint penalty 5.5 (6 mitigable inc. salt-air IP66, ISPS, EU-content cells). VOB/VgV bid capability gap is binding blocker without joint-bid partner.
